evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my Android BarcodeCapture app from SDK v6 to v7. Here is my current Activity: ActivityV6.kt.
evals.expected_output: The skill informs the user about the SMART scan intention default change in v7 and provides the migration guide URL. It does not change BarcodeCapture.forDataCaptureContext, and preserves the BarcodeCaptureListener implementation.

assertions.text: The user is informed about the new default SMART scan intention in v7
The migration guide URL (https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/android/migrate-6-to-7/) is provided
The BarcodeCaptureListener implementation (onBarcodeScanned, etc.) is preserved

evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Scandit Android barcode scanning SDK from v7 to v8. What do I need to change in my code?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that native Android BarcodeCapture has no breaking API changes in v7→v8. The only change to watch for is VideoResolution.AUTO deprecation. It does NOT tell the user to replace BarcodeCapture.forDataCaptureContext with a new constructor pattern (that change is for cross-platform SDKs only).

assertions.text: The skill mentions that there are no breaking API changes for native Android BarcodeCapture in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace BarcodeCapture.forDataCaptureContext with BarcodeCapture(settings) + addMode (that is a cross-platform SDK change)
